content:
QBR SUMMARY
Customer: Harmon Retail Group
Customer ID: C005
Contract ID: K022
Account Executive: James Okafor
Period: H1 2025 (January – June 2025)
Meeting Date: July 8, 2025
Attendees: James Okafor (AE), Sandra Harmon (COO), Darius Moore (Regional Manager West), Marcus Lee (Distribution Center Manager)

BUSINESS PERFORMANCE
Harmon Retail reached 28 company-owned stores and 14 franchise locations in H1 2025, exceeding their franchise expansion target. The second distribution center is under construction with an expected opening in Q4 2025. Sandra Harmon shared the company had its strongest H1 revenue in company history.

PLATFORM USAGE
65 licensed users active. Weekly active rate is 93%. Mobile usage at 69%. Guest link franchise workaround has been abandoned by most franchise locations — only 3 of 14 are using it. Sandra Harmon characterized this as an ongoing unresolved issue.

KEY DISCUSSION POINTS
- Franchise access remains the dominant concern — Sandra escalated her frustration directly, noting the guest link workaround has effectively failed at scale
- James Okafor shared that the franchise read-only tier has been added to the 2026 roadmap with a tentative H1 2026 delivery date — Sandra acknowledged this but noted she has been hearing "next year" for two years
- Second distribution center opening in Q4 2025 will add 18 users — renewal conversation to account for this
- Sandra Harmon confirmed she remains committed to the platform for the core business but indicated the franchise access issue will be a central topic at the 2025 renewal

SATISFACTION RATING: 3.5/5
Sandra Harmon: "The core platform is excellent. The franchise access situation has become a real business problem for us and I need to see it resolved, not promised."

ACTION ITEMS
- James Okafor to arrange a call between Sandra Harmon and our Head of Product to discuss the franchise read-only tier directly — scheduled for August 2025
- Distribution center expansion of 18 users to be built into renewal proposal
- Renewal conversation to begin no later than September 2025

NEXT QBR: January 2026
